# Image Generation Prompts — All Missing Assets

**Style guide for ALL images:**
- Photorealistic 3D UI mockups on dark gradient backgrounds (#0a0a0f to #1a1a2e)
- Glass-morphism effects, subtle neon accent glows (brand red/orange)
- Aspect ratio: 16:9 (1920×1080) for heroes, 4:3 (800×600) for features
- No text overlays, no watermarks
- Clean, minimal compositions — one primary element in focus
- Soft ambient lighting with colored rim light matching the page accent

---

## HERO IMAGES (9 total)

### 1. cloud_devops_hero.png
> A photorealistic 3D render of a floating cloud infrastructure dashboard. A sleek dark glass terminal window shows live Kubernetes pod status with green health indicators. Behind it, translucent holographic server racks glow with blue and purple neon edges. Subtle particle effects suggest data flowing between nodes. Dark gradient background (#0a0a0f). Studio lighting with cool blue rim light. Ultra-detailed, 8K quality.

### 2. custom_software_hero.png
> A photorealistic 3D render of a premium code editor IDE floating in space. The screen shows clean, syntax-highlighted TypeScript code with a dark theme. Multiple floating glass panels surround it — a Git graph, a test results dashboard (all green), and a terminal with build output. Dark gradient background with subtle orange/red accent glow from behind. Dramatic studio lighting. Ultra-detailed, cinematic.

### 3. data_analytics_hero.png
> A photorealistic 3D render of a floating analytics dashboard with multiple glass panels. The main panel shows a real-time line chart with an upward trend in green. Surrounding panels display a heat map, a pie chart, and data table rows. Translucent glass-morphism cards with subtle data visualizations. Dark gradient background with purple accent glow. Soft volumetric lighting. Ultra-detailed, 8K quality.

### 4. digital_marketing_hero.png
> A photorealistic 3D render of a digital marketing command center. A large glass screen displays a campaign performance dashboard — CTR graphs, audience demographics pie chart, and ad spend ROI metrics in green. Floating around it are social media platform icons (abstracted, no logos) and a funnel visualization. Dark gradient background with warm orange rim light. Ultra-detailed, cinematic composition.

### 5. enterprise_platforms_hero.png
> A photorealistic 3D render of an enterprise system architecture. Multiple interconnected glass panels show a CRM pipeline view, an ERP inventory dashboard, and API integration flow diagrams with animated connection lines between them. Data flows between systems visualized as glowing particles. Dark gradient background with blue-purple accent. Soft studio lighting. Ultra-detailed, 8K quality.

### 6. ui_ux_hero.png
> A photorealistic 3D render of a Figma-style design workspace. A floating glass artboard shows a premium mobile app UI with clean typography and modern card layouts. Surrounding it are component libraries, color palette chips, and interactive prototype flow arrows. A cursor tool icon floats nearby. Dark gradient background with pink/magenta rim light. Ultra-detailed, artistic composition.

### 7. web_development_hero.png
> A photorealistic 3D render of a browser window displaying a premium landing page. The page shows a hero section with gradient text and a bento grid layout. Next to it, a floating VS Code panel shows React/Next.js code. A Lighthouse score badge shows "98" in green. Dark gradient background with teal accent glow. Dramatic cinematic lighting. Ultra-detailed, 8K.

### 8. content_creation_hero.png
> A photorealistic 3D render of an AI content creation workspace. A central glass panel shows generated text flowing from an AI prompt. Surrounding floating elements include: an audio waveform visualization, a video timeline editor, and AI-generated images in various styles. Glowing neural network connection lines between elements. Dark gradient background with warm amber accent. Ultra-detailed, cinematic.

### 9. careers_hero.png
> A photorealistic 3D render of a modern remote workspace. A premium MacBook Pro with a dark-mode code editor open, floating above a minimal glass desk. Surrounding floating elements: a video call grid (abstracted team faces), a Kanban board with tasks, and a green "Build Successful" notification. Dark gradient background with subtle orange/red brand glow. Warm, inviting studio lighting. Ultra-detailed.

## FEATURE IMAGES (35 total)

### Cloud & DevOps (6 features)

#### cloud_devops_feature_1.png — Cloud Migrations
> A photorealistic 3D render of data migration in progress. A traditional on-premise server rack (grey, industrial) on the left, with glowing data particles streaming through a portal to a modern cloud infrastructure (sleek, glass-morphism) on the right. Progress bar shows 73% complete. Dark background with blue accent glow.

#### cloud_devops_feature_2.png — CI/CD Pipelines
> A photorealistic 3D render of a CI/CD pipeline visualization. Glass nodes connected by glowing lines form a horizontal flow: Code → Build → Test → Deploy. Each node is a glass cube with status icons (checkmarks in green). The Deploy node has a rocket icon with subtle flame particle effects. Dark background with green accent.

#### cloud_devops_feature_3.png — Infrastructure as Code
> A photorealistic 3D render of a Terraform/IaC workspace. A floating code editor shows HCL configuration code. Connected to it via glowing lines are 3D infrastructure components: a VPC diagram, load balancer, auto-scaling group, and database cluster — all rendered as clean glass-morphism icons. Dark background with purple accent.

#### cloud_devops_feature_4.png — Cloud Cost Optimization
> A photorealistic 3D render of a cost dashboard. A large glass panel shows a monthly cloud spend chart with a dramatic downward trend (40% reduction highlighted in green). Floating beside it: pie charts showing resource allocation, and "optimized" badges with savings amounts. Dark background with green/gold accent glow.

#### cloud_devops_feature_5.png — Security Audits & Pen Testing
> A photorealistic 3D render of a security scanning interface. A floating glass terminal shows a vulnerability scan in progress with results categorized by severity (red/yellow/green). A 3D shield icon with a checkmark floats prominently. Digital lock icons and encrypted data stream effects. Dark background with red/orange accent.

#### cloud_devops_feature_6.png — Compliance & Zero-Trust
> A photorealistic 3D render of a compliance architecture diagram. Interconnected glass nodes labeled with shield icons form a zero-trust network. A central governance panel shows compliance status: SOC2 ✓, HIPAA ✓, GDPR ✓ in green badges. Access control layers visualized as concentric transparent barriers. Dark background with blue accent.

---

### Data Analytics (4 features)

#### data_analytics_feature_1.png — ETL Pipelines
> A photorealistic 3D render of a data pipeline flow. Multiple source icons (database cylinders, API endpoints, file icons) on the left feed glowing data streams into a central transformation engine (glass cube with gears), which outputs clean structured data into a data warehouse on the right. Dark background with blue/purple accent.

#### data_analytics_feature_2.png — BI Dashboards
> A photorealistic 3D render of a business intelligence dashboard. A premium glass panel shows multiple visualization widgets: a geographic heat map, KPI scorecards, trend line charts, and a filterable data table. Clean dark UI with vibrant chart colors (green, blue, orange). Dark background with teal accent glow.

#### data_analytics_feature_3.png — Predictive Analytics
> A photorealistic 3D render of a predictive model visualization. A time-series graph shows historical data (solid line) transitioning into a prediction cone (dashed lines with confidence intervals). A neural network diagram floats beside it with glowing nodes. "Accuracy: 94%" badge in green. Dark background with purple accent.

#### data_analytics_feature_4.png — Actionable BI
> A photorealistic 3D render of an executive decision support screen. A glass panel shows a CEO-level dashboard: revenue metrics trending up, customer acquisition cost trending down, and automated alert notifications. A "Take Action" button glows with accent color. Clean, minimal executive aesthetic. Dark background with gold accent.

### Digital Marketing (6 features)

#### digital_marketing_feature_1.png — Organic Visibility & Content
> A photorealistic 3D render of SEO rankings visualization. A glass panel shows Google SERP results with position #1 highlighted in green. Surrounding elements: keyword ranking charts trending upward, content calendar grid, and organic traffic growth graph. Dark background with green accent glow.

#### digital_marketing_feature_2.png — Paid Advertising
> A photorealistic 3D render of an ad campaign dashboard. Central glass panel shows real-time ad metrics: ROAS 4.2x, CTR 3.8%, CPA trending down. Floating around it are ad format previews (search, display, social) as miniature glass cards. A budget gauge shows efficient spending. Dark background with orange accent.

#### digital_marketing_feature_3.png — Direct Nurturing & Retention
> A photorealistic 3D render of a marketing automation flow. A visual flowchart shows email sequences branching based on user actions: open → click → purchase, with conversion rates at each stage. Floating glass notification cards show email/SMS/WhatsApp messages. Dark background with warm coral accent.

#### digital_marketing_feature_4.png — Strategy, Tech & Analytics
> A photorealistic 3D render of a web analytics overview. A large glass panel shows a Google Analytics-style dashboard: session graphs, user behavior flow, conversion funnel with drop-off percentages. Heatmap overlay on a website wireframe floats nearby. Dark background with blue accent glow.

#### digital_marketing_feature_5.png — Lead Generation & Data Automation
> A photorealistic 3D render of a lead generation engine. A glass funnel visualization shows data flowing in from multiple sources (web scraping bots, forms, LinkedIn) into a CRM database. Lead cards with enriched data (name, company, score) float out from the bottom. Dark background with electric blue accent.

#### digital_marketing_feature_6.png — Motion Graphics & Video Production
> A photorealistic 3D render of a video production timeline. A floating video editor interface shows a timeline with multiple tracks (video, audio, effects). A preview window displays a product explainer frame. Floating 3D text and motion path curves surround the editor. Dark background with magenta/pink accent.

### Enterprise Platforms (7 features)

#### enterprise_platforms_feature_1.png — Custom ERP/CRM
> A photorealistic 3D render of a custom ERP dashboard. Multiple glass panels show: inventory levels, sales pipeline stages, financial reports, and HR modules. All connected with subtle flow lines indicating data synchronization. A "Custom Built" badge glows prominently. Dark background with blue accent.

#### enterprise_platforms_feature_2.png — API Integrations
> A photorealistic 3D render of API connectivity. A central hub (glass hexagon) connects to 8+ endpoint nodes via glowing REST API lines. Each node represents a different system (ERP, CRM, payment, shipping). Data packets visualized as light pulses traveling along connections. Dark background with teal accent.

#### enterprise_platforms_feature_3.png — Role-Based Access
> A photorealistic 3D render of access control hierarchy. A pyramid of user avatars (Admin → Manager → User → Guest) with decreasing permission levels visualized as concentric access rings. Lock/unlock icons and shield badges at each level. Dark background with purple/blue accent.

#### enterprise_platforms_feature_4.png — Seamless API Integrations
> A photorealistic 3D render of legacy-to-modern system bridge. On the left, a traditional grey server rack (legacy). On the right, modern cloud microservices (colorful glass cubes). Between them, a glowing API gateway translates requests with real-time data flowing. Dark background with green accent.

#### enterprise_platforms_feature_5.png — Custom CRM Solutions
> A photorealistic 3D render of a CRM pipeline view. A Kanban-style board with glass cards moving through stages: Lead → Qualified → Proposal → Won. Each card shows contact details and deal values. A "Win Rate: 68%" metric floats above. Dark background with orange accent.

#### enterprise_platforms_feature_6.png — Billing & Invoicing Software
> A photorealistic 3D render of an automated billing system. A glass panel shows an invoice being auto-generated with line items, tax calculations, and payment status. Floating nearby: subscription tier cards, payment method icons, and a "Revenue: ₹12.4L" counter. Dark background with gold accent.

#### enterprise_platforms_feature_7.png — Real-Time Dashboards
> A photorealistic 3D render of a live operations dashboard. Multiple glass panels show real-time KPIs with animated counter values, sparkline graphs, and status indicators (green/yellow/red). A "Last Updated: 2s ago" indicator pulses. Data refresh animation effects. Dark background with cyan accent.

### UI/UX Design (4 features)

#### ui_ux_feature_1.png — Wireframing & Prototyping
> A photorealistic 3D render of a Figma prototyping workspace. Multiple connected artboards showing an app flow (onboarding → home → detail → checkout) with blue prototype flow arrows between them. A hand cursor icon clicks a button, triggering the next screen transition. Dark background with blue accent.

#### ui_ux_feature_2.png — Design Systems
> A photorealistic 3D render of a design system library. A floating glass panel shows organized components: buttons (primary/secondary/ghost), typography scale, color palette swatches, spacing tokens, and icon grid. Everything neatly arranged in a Figma-style component page. Dark background with pink accent.

#### ui_ux_feature_3.png — Conversion Optimization
> A photorealistic 3D render of a UX audit visualization. A website wireframe with a heatmap overlay showing hot zones. Beside it: an A/B test comparison (version A 2.1% vs version B 4.8% conversion), and a user journey map with friction points highlighted in red. Dark background with orange accent.

#### ui_ux_feature_4.png — Component Libraries
> A photorealistic 3D render of a scalable component library. Floating glass cards show reusable UI components: navigation bars, card layouts, form inputs, modals, and data tables. Code snippets appear beside each component. A "100+ Components" badge glows. Dark background with purple accent.

#### web_development_feature_1.png — Next.js & React
> A photorealistic 3D render of a Next.js application architecture. A floating browser shows a server-rendered page with instant load. Beside it, a code editor shows React components with TypeScript. Performance metrics float: TTI 0.8s, FCP 0.3s. A Next.js logo-style abstract geometric shape glows in the background. Dark background with black/white accent.

#### web_development_feature_2.png — Node.js & Python
> A photorealistic 3D render of a backend architecture. A floating terminal shows API endpoint responses (JSON format). Connected to it: a database cluster, a message queue, and a microservices diagram. Request/response flow arrows with latency metrics (< 50ms). Dark background with green accent.

#### web_development_feature_3.png — Responsive Design
> A photorealistic 3D render showing the same premium website rendered on three floating devices: a desktop monitor, a tablet (landscape), and a smartphone — all showing the same content adapted perfectly to each screen size. CSS grid lines subtly visible. Dark background with teal accent.

#### web_development_feature_4.png — Core Web Vitals
> A photorealistic 3D render of a Lighthouse performance report. A large circular gauge shows score "98" in green. Surrounding metrics: LCP 1.2s ✓, FID 8ms ✓, CLS 0.01 ✓. A waterfall chart shows optimized resource loading. A trophy icon glows with achievement aesthetic. Dark background with green/gold accent.

> A photorealistic 3D render of an AI image generation interface. ---

## Generation Instructions

**For Gemini Imagen / DALL-E 3:**
1. Generate each at specified resolution (1920×1080 for heroes, 800×600 for features)
2. Save to paths listed above
3. Optimize all PNGs after generation (target < 200KB per feature, < 400KB per hero)
4. Ensure all have transparent-friendly dark backgrounds (no pure black edges)

**Directory to create:**
```
mkdir -p assets/images/services
```
